meta.title: I-LI CHIU | Superconducting Quantum RF Researcher
meta.description: Academic CV for I-LI CHIU, focused on superconducting quantum circuits, RF simulation, human-led AI-assisted research workflows, and scientific infrastructure.

hero.headline: Physics researcher turning uncertain questions into verifiable research systems.
hero.summary: I build research workflows where physical intuition, simulation evidence, and careful automation can meet. My current focus is superconducting quantum circuits, RF modeling, and the practical systems that make research easier to inspect and repeat.

about: I am drawn to problems that begin as a rough physical question rather than a clean assignment. My habit is to slow the problem down, name the assumptions, and build a small loop that can be checked by code, simulation, or data.

AI is part of that loop, but not a replacement for judgment. I use it to widen the search space, draft competing implementations, find blind spots, and accelerate documentation; the final answer still has to survive derivations, numerical checks, and direct inspection.
I care about quiet, reliable systems. A good script, storage setup, simulation report, or note should make the next question easier for future me and for the people working with me.
summary: Physics undergraduate at National Central University, expected to graduate in 2026 and planning to continue into graduate study in the same physics department.
Connects theoretical assumptions, layout-level design, solver outputs, and compute infrastructure into reviewable loops that can be tested, refined, and reused.
Uses human-led, AI-assisted development to explore options faster while keeping decisions grounded in physics reasoning, simulation evidence, and explicit verification.

bullets.label: Framed the physical model
bullets.text: Applied an admittance-based formulation to describe floating-qubit coupling paths and make the energy-relaxation mechanism explicit enough for analytical and numerical review.

bullets.label: Cross-checked assumptions
bullets.text: Compared quasi-static extraction with full-wave finite-element simulation to identify where model assumptions stayed consistent and where numerical differences could arise.

bullets.label: Built an iteration loop
bullets.text: Developed a workflow from GDSII layout to FEM simulation, connected to parametric design tooling so layout changes could become solver-ready experiments more quickly.

bullets.label: Used AI as engineering leverage
bullets.text: Worked in human-led, AI-assisted loops to draft automation paths, compare implementation options, review generated code, and keep the tooling tied to the underlying physics constraints.

bullets.label: Mapped circuit parameters
bullets.text: Linked lumped circuit models to Hamiltonian-level quantities around coupling strength and ZZ interaction space, enabling targeted scans for calibration-sensitive parameters.

bullets.label: Ran larger solver workloads
bullets.text: Used National Center for High-performance Computing (NCHC) cluster resources to run parallel computation for complex layout FEM models.

bullets.label: Balanced time and accuracy
bullets.text: Tuned mesh-refinement parameters systematically so simulation runtime, resource usage, and numerical reliability could be discussed with concrete evidence.

bullets.label: Supported lab data practices
bullets.text: Helped maintain a lab-scale Synology NAS environment, improving backup habits, team access, and day-to-day research-file reliability.

bullets.label: Built personal research infrastructure
bullets.text: Maintained a customized TrueNAS system integrated with Docker for research-data organization, automated backups, and flexible local compute environments.

details: Thesis: Study of XY-Line External Coupling Effects on Floating Qubit Energy Relaxation

meta.title: 邱羿理 | 超導量子 RF 研究者
meta.description: 邱羿理的學術履歷，聚焦超導量子電路、RF 模擬、human-led AI-assisted 研究流程與科學基礎設施。

hero.headline: 把模糊的物理問題整理成可驗證研究系統的研究者。
hero.summary: 我關注物理直覺、模擬證據與自動化流程如何互相校準。目前主要投入超導量子電路、RF 建模，以及讓研究過程更容易檢查、重現與迭代的實務系統。

about: 我喜歡處理一開始還不乾淨、甚至有點模糊的問題。我的習慣是先把問題放慢，把假設、證據與不確定性分開，再做出一個可以被程式、模擬或資料檢查的小循環。
AI 是這個循環的一部分，但不是取代判斷的捷徑。我會用它擴大搜尋空間、草擬不同實作、找出盲點與加速文件整理；最後仍要回到推導、數值檢查與人工驗證。
我在意安靜而可靠的系統。好的腳本、儲存環境、模擬報告或研究筆記，應該讓未來的自己與合作的人更容易提出下一個問題。
summary: 國立中央大學物理系學士班學生，預計 2026 年畢業，並預計續讀同校物理系研究所。
能將理論假設、layout 設計、solver 輸出與運算基礎設施串成可檢查、可修正、可重用的研究迴圈。
採用 human-led, AI-assisted 的開發方式加速探索與實作，同時讓決策回到物理推理、模擬證據與明確驗證。

projects.title: 浮動量子位元能量弛豫研究
projects.meta: 學士論文，國立中央大學

bullets.label: 建立物理模型
bullets.text: 應用 admittance-based formulation 描述浮動量子位元的耦合路徑，讓能量弛豫機制能被分析推導與數值模擬共同檢查。

bullets.label: 交叉檢查假設
bullets.text: 比較準靜態萃取與全波有限元素模擬，確認模型假設在不同方法下的一致性，並辨識可能造成數值差異的位置。

projects.title: Layout-to-FEM 研究工作流
projects.meta: 模擬自動化與參數探索

bullets.label: 建立迭代循環
bullets.text: 開發從 GDSII layout 到 FEM 模擬的工作流，並串接參數化設計工具，讓 layout 變更能更快形成可進 solver 的實驗。

bullets.label: 把 AI 作為工程槓桿
bullets.text: 以 human-led, AI-assisted 的方式草擬自動化路徑、比較實作方案、審查生成程式碼，並確保工具設計仍受物理約束校準。

bullets.label: 映射電路參數
bullets.text: 將集總電路模型連到 Hamiltonian 層級的耦合強度與 ZZ interaction space，使參數掃描能聚焦在校準敏感的電路量。

projects.title: 運算與 Mesh Refinement 實務

bullets.label: 執行較大規模 solver 任務
bullets.text: 運用國家高速網路與計算中心（NCHC）叢集資源，針對複雜 layout FEM 模型進行平行運算。

bullets.label: 平衡時間與精度
bullets.text: 系統性調整 mesh-refinement 參數，讓模擬時間、資源使用與數值可靠性可以用具體證據討論。

projects.title: 研究基礎設施與資料環境

bullets.label: 協助實驗室資料環境
bullets.text: 協助維護實驗室級 Synology NAS 環境，改善備份習慣、團隊存取與日常研究檔案可靠性。

bullets.label: 建構個人研究基礎設施
bullets.text: 維護客製化 TrueNAS 系統並整合 Docker，用於研究資料整理、自動化備份與彈性的本地運算環境。

education.school: 國立中央大學（National Central University）
details: 論文題目：Study of XY-Line External Coupling Effects on Floating Qubit Energy Relaxation
